title: poa orthophylla
intro: Poa orthophylla, also known as the "Bluegrass", is a type of perennial grass native to Australia, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa orthophylla include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Poa orthophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in topical creams and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
